item.text: D.R.17/2024 - Drug Dependants (Treatment and Rehabilitation) (Amendment) Bill 2024 (Passed)
Presented by:YB Datuk Seri Dr. Shamsul Anuar bin Haji Nasarah - Timbalan Menteri Dalam Negeri
Presented by:YB Senator Datuk Seri Saifuddin Nasution bin Ismail - Menteri Dalam Negeri
D.R.18/2024 - Administration of Islamic Law (Federal Territories) (Amendment) Bill 2024 (Passed)
Presented by:YB Senator Dr. Zulkifli bin Hasan - Timbalan Menteri di Jabatan Perdana Menteri (Hal Ehwal Agama)
Presented by:YB Senator Dr. Zulkifli bin Hasan - Timbalan Menteri di Jabatan Perdana Menteri (Hal Ehwal Agama)
